title: taraxacum ohirense
intro: Taraxacum ohirense, also known as the Japanese dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum ohirense is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
